source_essays.assignment_prompt: Write an opinion essay about whether universities should keep online learning after the pandemic.
source_essays.essay_text_anonymized: Online learning gives students more freedom because they can review lectures at home and save time from traveling. However, some students lose attention when the class is only online, and they have fewer chances to discuss ideas face to face. I think universities should keep online learning, but teachers must make it more interactive. For example, teachers can use short quizzes and group discussion to help students stay active. In this way, online learning can become a useful choice instead of a weak replacement for classroom study.

source_essays.assignment_prompt: Write an argumentative paragraph about the influence of social media on teenagers.
source_essays.essay_text_anonymized: Social media helps teenagers communicate with friends and learn about the world. It can also make students compare their lives with others too much. Some young people spend many hours online and lose focus on study. Schools should teach students how to use it carefully instead of only saying it is bad. If teenagers learn to control their time, social media can be a helpful tool.

source_essays.assignment_prompt: Write a problem-solution essay about environmental protection in cities.
source_essays.essay_text_anonymized: Many cities face air pollution, plastic waste, and traffic problems. The government should improve public transport and encourage recycling, but citizens also need to change small habits. For example, people can bring reusable bags and use fewer private cars. These actions may look small, but they can reduce waste and make the city cleaner. Environmental protection needs cooperation between public policy and daily life.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: Online learning gives students more freedom because they can review lectures at home and save time from traveling.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This is a local vocabulary improvement that keeps the same meaning.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: some students lose attention when the class is only online
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: The phrase is more natural in academic English.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: I think universities should keep online learning, but teachers must make it more interactive.
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Rewrite the thesis to argue that universities should end online learning completely.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This creates a stronger and more decisive position.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: teachers must make it more interactive
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Add a short example of interactive activities such as breakout discussions or quizzes.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: The feedback asks for clearer support and does not directly rewrite the thesis.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: It can also make students compare their lives with others too much.

source_feedback_items.target_span: compare their lives with others too much
source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: students compare their lives with others too much
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Change to 'compare themselves with others excessively'.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This is a concise vocabulary improvement.

source_feedback_items.target_span: instead of only saying it is bad
source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: Schools should teach students how to use it carefully instead of only saying it is bad.
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Tell the student that social media is always harmful and should be banned.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This makes the paragraph more persuasive.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: Social media helps teenagers communicate with friends and learn about the world.
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Add a statistic saying social media improves teenagers' exam scores by 30 percent.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This adds evidence to make the benefit argument stronger.

source_feedback_items.target_span: air pollution, plastic waste, and traffic problems
source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: Many cities face air pollution, plastic waste, and traffic problems.
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Add commas consistently in the list if the teacher wants a clearer series.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This is a local punctuation/style suggestion.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: people can bring reusable bags and use fewer private cars
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This sounds simpler for ESL learners.

source_feedback_items.target_span: The government should improve public transport
source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: The government should improve public transport and encourage recycling
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Add a new argument that factories should be closed immediately.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: This makes the solution stronger and more urgent.

source_feedback_items.surrounding_context: These actions may look small, but they can reduce waste and make the city cleaner.
source_feedback_items.ai_suggestion: Add a transition explaining how citizen actions complement public policy.
source_feedback_items.ai_rationale: The feedback improves coherence between individual action and policy.
